NORMAL baseline with four WATCH conditions. The US policy analysis ecosystem retains structural independence at the major institutional level. The elevated FARA enforcement (35 active investigations) represents system self-correction rather than system capture. The most important signal to watch is IC-policy alignment — a score below 0.60 would indicate the intelligence-policy interface has broken down at an operationally significant level.

Atlantic Council WATCH: The Atlantic Council’s disclosed funding from UAE, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia represents the highest FARA risk profile among the top-10 think tanks. This does not indicate capture — it indicates elevated monitoring. Any policy output on Middle East or energy policy from Atlantic Council should be read with source-funding awareness. KC_01 fires only on confirmed adversary (state-level enemy) capture, not Gulf state engagement.

US Stock Impact | Baseline TTPRI 0.2500 NORMAL
INTELLIGENCE-POLICY GAP SIGNAL: A widening IC-policy gap (KC_03 trajectory) is paradoxically bullish for private sector intelligence analysis providers (PLTR, CACI, BAH) — government relies more on contractor analysis when internal policy coordination breaks down. It is bearish for government efficiency and regulatory predictability, which affects companies dependent on clear policy direction.
StockTickerLogicPrimary ChannelDirection on TTPRI SpikeNote
Palantir TechnologiesPLTR BULLISH ic_policy_alignment ↑ RISES on IC gap IC-policy gap = more government data analysis contracts; TTPRI spike = Palantir budget relevance
CACI InternationalCACI BULLISH ic_policy_alignment + foreign_influence ↑ RISES Intelligence analysis contracts + FARA compliance monitoring infrastructure
Booz Allen HamiltonBAH BULLISH ic_policy_alignment ↑ RISES Government strategic advisory; IC-policy gap = more contractor bridging work
SAICSAIC BULLISH foreign_influence_channel ↑ RISES Government research IT; foreign influence threat = CI infrastructure spend increases
ICF InternationalICFI BEARISH on budget democratic_integrity ↓ FALLS on democratic erosion Government consulting & policy research contracts — democratic erosion = contract predictability risk
GartnerIT NEUTRAL expert_network_health ↔ MIXED Research and advisory; policy ecosystem fragmentation = advisory demand but quality risk
Axon EnterpriseAXON NEUTRAL democratic_integrity ↔ MIXED Law enforcement tech; democratic erosion watch creates uncertain regulatory environment
News CorpNWSA MIXED expert_network_health ↔ VOLATILE Media-policy interface; expert network polarization = audience fragmentation, volatile ad market
LeidosLDOS BULLISH ic_policy_alignment ↑ RISES Government IT and intelligence infrastructure; IC-policy gap = contractor dependency increases
L3Harris TechnologiesLHX NEUTRAL foreign_influence_channel ↔ NEUTRAL-POSITIVE Defense comms and surveillance; limited direct policy think tank exposure
The Counterintuitive TTPRI Trade: A TTPRI spike from foreign policy capture (KC_01) would be initially BEARISH for broad market (geopolitical shock) but paradoxically BULLISH for intelligence contractors (PLTR, CACI, BAH, LDOS) as government response would accelerate contract spend on domestic intelligence analysis infrastructure. The key is to separate the shock effect (broad sell-off) from the recovery allocation (defense/intelligence outperformance).
Q3 2026 Outlook — Think Tank & Policy Signal Calendar
Three conditions that would escalate TTPRI from NORMAL to ELEVATED:
🔴 DOJ confirms adversary-state takeover of a major US think tank (KC_01 single trigger — immediate CRITICAL)
🔴 FARA indictments reach 15+ think tank researchers in 90 days (KC_02 — ELEVATED)
🔴 IC-policy alignment score falls below 0.55 in next NIC assessment (KC_03 approach — WATCH escalation)
V-Dem score dropping below 0.68 would trigger a KC_04 pre-alert regardless of other conditions.

ACADEMIC_RESEARCH (Domain 126)  ·  GOV_RESEARCH_PIPELINE (Domain 127)  ·  THINK_TANK_POLICY (Domain 128)

THINK_TANK_POLICY_CANARY monitors the epistemic infrastructure of US democracy — the network of research institutions, policy analysts, and expert communities that translate knowledge into governance. When this network is captured, polarized, or hollowed out, the quality of US strategic decision-making degrades across all domains. This is the most subtle and hardest-to-detect failure mode in CivilisationOS.
